description: Japan, shifting from its pacifist constitution, is now poised to export lethal weapons. This significant policy change, driven by regional security concerns, allows Tokyo to leverage its advanced defense technology. The move opens new avenues for its burgeoning defense industry, potentially transforming Japan into a major global arms supplier.

description: Mike Vrabel, the New England Patriots’ head coach, and the former New York Times’ NFL reporter, Dianna Russini, are still the talk of the town due to their alleged affair drama that sparked shockwaves across the league, a few days ago. While both have distanced themselves from the drama, it seems the scandal has now taken a turn for the worse.

The Patriots continue business as usual, and Russini has resigned, but public attention remains fixed on Vrabel’s personal life and rumored strain at home.

description: 'Bhooth Bangla' Day 5 box office tracking shows the Akshay Kumar and Priyadarshan film crossing the Rs. 100 crore mark globally. Despite a 70% drop on its first Monday, the horror-comedy remains a topic of discussion for its nostalgic cast including Paresh Rawal and Rajpal Yadav. As of April 21, 2026, the domestic net collection stands at Rs. 65.46 crore.

title: London nightclub clash: Klaudia Zakrzewska hit by Gabrielle Carrington
description: Klaudia Zakrzewska, known as Klaudia Glam, is in critical condition after being hit by a car outside a London nightclub. Video shows a fight with Gabrielle Carrington before the crash. Carrington has been arrested, police confirmed. Two others were injured. Authorities are asking witnesses to come forward as the investigation continues.
